title: Minimal recurrent motif (sb1 rs2 g0.18) – non-record submission
author: megnat05-tmm

data.description: Uses a single shared block reused across recurrent steps to build larger effective structure with fewer parameters.

novel_contributions: Minimal recurrent motif architecture emphasizing structural reuse over explicit depth
Single shared block reused across recurrent steps
Soft gating for recurrence with initialization at 0.18
Improved compression under the 16MB constraint through compact operator reuse
